description_long: This object is a single slice of white sandwich bread with a light brown crust along its edges and a soft, slightly textured surface. The center of the bread features a glossy, raised, oval-shaped area in a reddish-pink color, resembling a spread or filling. The bread's surface is mostly matte, but the central area is distinctly shinier and smoother, standing out visually and texturally. The crust is even and unbroken, with a gentle gradient from golden brown to the pale interior. The slice appears thick and slightly puffy, suggesting a soft, airy interior typical of fresh sandwich bread. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or scoring on the crust.
description: A thick, soft slice of white sandwich bread with a light brown crust and a glossy, reddish-pink oval spread in the center.
description_view_0: The bread slice is seen from a low angle, highlighting the shiny, reddish-pink oval spread centered on the soft, pale surface and the even, golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the raised, three-dimensional quality of the central spread, which appears more pronounced and textured from the side.
description_view_2: The bread is shown with the glossy, reddish-pink spread fully visible and centered, with the crust forming a smooth border around the slice.
description_view_3: The side angle again accentuates the height and shape of the central spread, showing its depth and the soft, puffy nature of the bread.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust forms a continuous, smooth, light brown border around the bread slice with no visible scoring, seeds, or flour dusting. Its texture is even and slightly rounded, typical of standard sandwich bread.
